records.ety: [L. constrictus, p. p. of constringere. See Constrain.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Constricted; p. pr. & vb. n. Constricting.]

defs: To draw together; to render narrower or smaller; to bind; to cramp; to contract or cause to shrink.
quotes: Such things as constrict the fibers.
Membranous organs inclosing a cavity which their contraction serves to constrict.
